news.text: Why the U.S. Navy’s retail business is fighting Walmart and Amazon to fund its own future
Hezbollah pauses attacks, sources say, Israel says operations in Lebanon continue - reuters.com
Evangelicals amplify Trump's religious framing of Iran war - reuters.com
Trump meets NATO chief as Iran war strains alliance - reuters.com
India set to get first Iranian oil cargo in 7 years, tracking data shows - reuters.com
US and Iran agree to two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan - reuters.com

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Futures are mixed in a tight range as markets digest the US-Iran ceasefire news. VIX spiking 3.36% to 35.02 shows underlying tension despite the diplomatic breakthrough. Small caps (IWM +0.22%) outpacing large caps signals risk-on rotation, but elevated volatility warns of fragile sentiment.

◆ What to Watch

  • Oil volatility - Energy complex whipsawing on ceasefire headlines, XLE still up 0.80% pre-market despite crude selloff
  • RPM earnings (BMO) - Industrial coatings play reporting with 0.36 EPS estimate amid materials sector weakness
  • Defense sector reaction - Monitor RTX, LMT, NOC as Iran war developments shift military spending outlook
  • VIX term structure - Front month volatility elevated suggests tactical hedging despite ceasefire optimism

◆ Sector Rotation

Energy leading (+0.80%) as traders position for supply disruption scenarios despite ceasefire. Consumer discretionary (-1.16%) and staples (-1.69%) getting hammered as inflation fears resurface with geopolitical premium. Tech (+0.48%) showing relative strength, suggesting flight to quality amid uncertainty.
⚡ Key Driver
Two-week ceasefire timeline creates short-term trading window - expect heightened volatility as deadline approaches
⚠ Bear Case
VIX spike alongside flat equity futures screams institutional hedging - smart money positioning for breakdown

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY 655 - Key support from Monday's low, break triggers 645 test
  • QQQ 590 - Resistance confluence, reclaim opens 595 measured move
  • VIX 38 - Prior resistance turned support, break higher signals capitulation phase
  • XLE 95 - Energy sector breakout level despite oil weakness

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
